title: Baker Ross FX960 Easter Egg Picks - Pack of 8, Easter Embellishments for Crafts
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Easter Decorations: This multipack contains colourful patterned Easter egg picks. These versatile craft decorations are perfect for embellishing Easter and spring craft projects.
Kids Arts and Crafts: Boys and girls will enjoy adding these 3D embellishments to their crafts. This value pack is perfect for crafting at home, at school and in the classroom.
Easter Craft Accessories: Use with Baker Ross wreath blanks (not included) to make Easter wreaths and decorations.
Included in the Pack: This pack contains 8 pieces. Eggs come in 3 assorted colours - yellow, orange and green, and 2 patterns - polka dots and stripes. Egg size 4cm.

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: From the manufacturer Glitter Carrots Add sparkle to your Easter crafts with Glitter Carrots! This pack of 15 glittery carrots offers a fun and festive touch to decorations or craft projects. Perfect for embellishing Easter baskets, cards, or creating vibrant displays for the season. Pom Pom Bunnies Craft some adorable Pom Pom Bunnies for Easter! This pack of 12 kits allows you to create fluffy and charming bunny decorations. Ideal for kids' crafting sessions or as Easter decorations, these bunnies add a playful and whimsical touch to your Easter festivities. Easter Egg Picks Decorate with Easter Egg Picks! This pack of eight colourful egg picks adds a delightful flair to floral arrangements, centerpieces, or any Easter-themed display. These picks are perfect for adding a pop of Easter joy to your home decor. Mini Woven Baskets Create adorable Easter baskets or decorations with Mini Woven Baskets! This pack of six baskets offers a delightful base for crafting personalized Easter baskets or as charming table decorations for Easter meals or events.
